scope_note: QA Whittaker Two-Scalar-Potential Bridge Cert candidate family [507], standalone unregistered artifact. Layer 4 v1 of the Whittaker -> QA development ladder. Primary source: E. T. Whittaker (1904), On an expression of the electromagnetic field due to electrons by means of two scalar potential functions, Proc. London Math. Soc. s2-1:367-372. DOI: 10.1112/plms/s2-1.1.367 (on disk: Documents/whittaker_corpus/whittaker_1904_two_scalar_potential_functions_electromagnetic_field.pdf). Hard dependency: registered family [273] qa_whittaker_rational_direction_s2_cert_v1 supplies exact rational S2 directions D_m^(2) through the inverse_stereographic_excluding_south_pole chart. Lineage context only: registered [498] qa_whittaker_phase_packet_algebra_cert_v1. CLAIM (narrow): for a QA-rational plane-wave packet built from a [273] direction omega and declared QA-rational k, v, c, the twelve raw differential-operator coefficients of the Whittaker 1904 six-component map (Phi,Psi) -> (dx,dy,dz,hx,hy,hz), reproduced verbatim from primary source p.370 sec.3 (Phi renamed from F, Psi renamed from G to avoid collision with QA-reserved F=a*b, G=d^2+e^2), are exact fractions.Fraction values, and div(h) both channels plus div(d) Psi-channel vanish exactly and unconditionally while div(d) Phi-channel vanishes exactly under dispersion v*v=c*c or under the degenerate direction case Kz=0; for nonzero-Kz packets, dispersion is necessary and sufficient. Drafting note: a pre-primary-source hand derivation of hz by false symmetry with dz (Gzz-(1/c^2)Gtt) was caught and rejected during construction because it breaks div(h)=0; the primary source's actual hz=Gxx+Gyy is what is implemented and is the form that makes div(h)=0 unconditional. This cert does NOT prove Maxwell equations, does NOT derive electromagnetism, does NOT reconstruct any physical field, does NOT claim Mie scattering or scalar-wave-energy physics, and does NOT claim Layer 5 (field reconstruction) or Layer 6 (spherical/Mie) results. Checks WSPB_1/WSPB_2/WSPB_3/WSPB_4/WSPB_5/WSPB_6/WSPB_7/WSPB_8/SCHEMA/F; self-test expected ok before registration.
